title: El and L's Interiors Data Pack
description: A data pack that adds crafting recipes and loot tables for Create: Interiors chairs in all 20 colors from El and L’s Dye Mod.
body:
This data pack adds crafting recipes and loot tables for the 20 new [**Create: Interiors**](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors) chair colors from [**El and L's Dye Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/el-and-ls-dye-mod), making them fully obtainable in survival mode.

For the best experience, I highly recommend using this data pack alongside my resource pack, which adds the necessary models and textures for the new colored chairs.

[Download the resource pack here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/el-and-ls-interiors-rp)
